name: teammate
description: Your team's brain in your team's git repo. Local-LLM-queryable, Obsidian-friendly. The Teamspace alternative for teams who can't put context in someone else's cloud.

teammate-brain.description: Exposes the team brain (CLAUDE.md, skills, rules, docs, knowledge) as MCP resources + a brain.search tool.

requires.ollama: optional (for the local-LLM RAG path; falls back to keyword search)
